lecturer_note: Guest lecture by Dr. Mike Balmforth, former Eagar student and consulting colleague. Tom Eagar present but not speaking on this recording.
topic: Stainless steel welding metallurgy: classifications, alloying elements, Schaeffler diagram, austenitic stainless steels (304/316), solidification modes, solidification cracking, intergranular corrosion, sensitization
editorial_flags: p1: 'Dr. [Balmforth?]' — second consulting group member name garbled by captioner; possibly Bahnmiller or similar. Needs editor review.

p13: 'both ferrite and [austenite]' — captioner rendered 'Martin site' but technical context (duplex alloys 50/50) requires austenite. Likely captioner error rather than speaker slip given Balmforth's expertise in this region. Flag for editor confirmation.
p14: 'Professor [Roher?]' — faculty name uncertain in captioner rendering.
p20, p21: two student questions inaudible on transcript; attribution inferred from Balmforth's repeated content.
